use_cases: Organizing content into expandable sections to reduce visual clutter
Displaying FAQs with accordion-style question-answer pairs
Creating settings panels where users can expand categories
Building documentation navigation with nested expandable sections
Structuring dashboard information into collapsible cards
ai_summary: A shadcnspace accordion component featuring expandable content panels with colored icons and subtle color accents. Each accordion item displays a title, subtitle, and icon (FileText, Folder, Settings, Users) with distinct text and background colors. The component uses clean Tailwind styling with a rounded border design and hover states, providing an organized way to present categorized content that expands on user interaction.
